name: ProtoScribe
tagline: Hands-free protocol guide for BSL-3 researchers
description: Voice-first protocol guidance and timestamped lab-note capture for Even Realities G2 smart glasses.
author: TRAE

permissions.name: g2-microphone
permissions.desc: Capture audio from the glasses mic for voice commands and note transcription.

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Connect to the local ProtoScribe backend and optional cloud STT services.
